concerns.text: FR-009 (Makefile orchestration of all steps) is not referenced in any phase of the plan. The plan’s Phase Mapping table never lists FR‑009, leaving this functional requirement unaddressed.
FR-012 (CLI flag `--seed <int>` for reproducible random seed) is absent from the Phase Mapping. No phase cites FR‑012, so the seed‑control requirement is not guaranteed.
FR-025 (Retention of raw correlation scores for unbiased AUROC/AUPRC) is not mentioned in any phase. Although raw correlations are described in the summary, the explicit FR‑025 mapping is missing.
FR-026 (Construct‑validity justification citing literature and sensitivity analysis) is not linked to any phase. The plan does not indicate where this justification will be generated.
